decision.summary: VIRLUX is agentic factory SaaS online on labs-sandbox Supabase — no FINTRAC/payment rails on VIRLUX.
decision.supersedes: ASF-2026-06-19-VIRLUX-TO-LABS payment graduation framing on VIRLUX product

projects.agent_db_access: restricted — no direct prod writes from autonomous agents
allowed — only credential agents may hold
projects.virlux_product: agentic_factory_saas_only — Build Factory catalog, sandbox bays, MCP verify; FINTRAC/payments OUT
projects.graduation_trigger: Real money, payment settlement, or MSB/FINTRAC customer financial data on VIRLUX → STOP; ship on TrustField or new isolated project, not VIRLUX. Agentic SaaS without payment rails may stay online on labs-sandbox. See labs/virlux/README.md

integration.assumption_pending_founder_confirm: Noetfield/TrustField do not require live reads of Virlux transactional tables
